name: Gateway's Acquisition of eMachines Bodes Well
description: Aberdeen analysis of Gateway's $235 million acquisition of privately-held eMachines. Argues the deal is a shrewd distribution-channel play: eMachines's shelf space at Best Buy, Circuit City, and CompUSA lets Gateway deemphasize its costly 170-store chain, combine Gateway's high-end all-in-ones and plasma TVs with eMachines's budget retail strength to out-compete HP, and expand digital consumer electronics distribution.
